repo_prior_art.cite: none; nearest eid_lingam_direction_min_order_v1 concerns non-Gaussian cumulants, not Gaussian-ANM score geometry

published_prior_art.cite: rolland2022score gives SCORE leaf recovery; zhu2023sample gives SCORE finite-sample upper guarantees; neither maps diagonal score-Jacobian variance to Chernoff information at the reversible boundary

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue causal-order likelihood frontier for this mirror ANM experiment

published_prior_art.cite: chernoff1952measure supplies the fixed-simple-hypothesis exponent, while the C_star-to-C_m consequence depends on the new local geometry
koehler2023efficiency studies score-matching parameter efficiency, not the specified cross-fitted diagonal-Jacobian causal-order detector on this mirror experiment

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / ass:jacobian-estimability
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Efficiency is conditional on existence of cross-fitted L4 estimators for the diagonal score-Jacobian functionals at the stated nuisance rate; this condition is assumed, not derived from the ANM path.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The feasible-efficiency question is only whether D_n attains the likelihood exponent conditional on ass:jacobian-estimability and r_n=o(C_m(delta_n)).

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Extend the mirror calculation to a normalized smooth tangent class and give uniform constants relating C_m to Chernoff information, rather than only one fixed g.

Derive a necessary-and-sufficient condition, or an explicit loss example, for when D_n can match the likelihood exponent; L4 consistency alone is unlikely to determine an exact large-deviation exponent.
State a finite-n corollary translating C_m(delta) into a concrete sample-size requirement and contrast it quantitatively with Zhu et al.'s sufficient SCORE guarantee.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with the accepted conditional scope for the feasible-detector question; preserve the field framing and prioritize the detector-efficiency boundary.
